task_summary: SP24a proved the CLI-first mew-wisp human cat surface can render explicit live desk adapter output through the existing opt-in injected desk_provider path, without adding hidden live reads, shell execution, core imports, or launcher execution.

notes: Codex did not write product code. The product change is a mew-authored focused test proving that the human cat terminal surface can render injected live desk status/action evidence from an explicit provider, with diagnostics gated behind --details and no dependency on --desk-json fixture names. The operator corrected only local proof/report artifacts after verification. The attempt also exposed implementation-lane polish evidence: mew applied tool #1530 despite a dry-run-only steering request, and the final work-session git_diff closeout failed because the repo root was outside declared read roots.
